programme.title: Seven's National News At Noon
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Seven News With Alex Cullen
programme.desc: Join Alex Cullen for all the latest news headlines, as he kicks off Seven's Winning Arvo featuring an entertaining lineup of quiz shows and news updates every hour.

programme.title: Time Is Money
programme.desc: Sara Davies hosts the quickest quiz where contestants are given their prize money from the start but must race to keep hold of it. Only one can make the final and a chance to win big.

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Friends Rob, Diane, Glen and Dave take on the Bridge of Lies.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Four contestants go into battle against the Chaser as they try to win thousands of pounds. However, standing in the way is their common enemy, the Chaser, one of the finest quiz brains in the UK.

programme.title: Seven News At 4
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: The Chase Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Larry Emdur, The Chase is a general knowledge race where players must ensure they stay one step ahead of the Chaser, some of the finest quiz brains in Australia. The Chase is on...

programme.title: Seven News
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mali and John hatch a plan. Roo's concern for Alf grows. Sonny makes a triumphant return.

programme.title: My Reno Rules
programme.desc: The stakes skyrocket as Adrian Portelli drops a huge announcement to turn the competition on its head. Teams race to finish, driven by the desire to win big, but the judges are in for a mixed bag.

programme.title: House Of Wellness
programme.desc: Join Mel Doyle and Shane Crawford where no topic is off limits from mental health, innovations in health, treatments for common illnesses, natural medicines, and explorations into food.

programme.title: The Agenda Setters
programme.desc: Footy’s home of hard-hitting opinions, breaking news, and respected analysis. Seven’s team of trusted and respected footy voices tackle the biggest topics and take viewers behind the headlines.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Kerry and Tom battle to save a woman who’s in cardiac arrest. A man’s stabbed several times at a residential address. A hero toddler calls 999 when his mum falls down the stairs.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: The pressure is on as Max takes on his first annual fundraising gala at the hospital, and emotions are high as some of the doctors' families join them for the event.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: Sunrise Early News
programme.desc: Wake up to a better breakfast with Natalie Barr and Matt Shirvington for all the latest news, sport and weather.

programme.title: Sunrise
programme.desc: Wake up to a better breakfast with Natalie Barr and Matt Shirvington for all the latest news, sport and weather.

programme.title: Sunrise
programme.desc: Wake up to a better breakfast with Natalie Barr and Matt Shirvington for all the latest news, sport and weather.

programme.title: The Morning Show
programme.desc: Join Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies each morning for a variety of segments on the latest news, entertainment and other hot topics.

programme.title: Seven's National News At Noon
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Seven News With Alex Cullen
programme.desc: Join Alex Cullen for all the latest news headlines, as he kicks off Seven's Winning Arvo featuring an entertaining lineup of quiz shows and news updates every hour.

programme.title: Time Is Money
programme.desc: Sara Davies hosts the quickest quiz where contestants are given their prize money from the start but must race to keep hold of it. Only one can make the final and a chance to win big.

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Friends Jacqui, Harry, Annie and Andrew take on the Bridge of Lies. One by one, they must cross the Bridge, stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. Charmian, Raymond, Amanda and Richard work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.

programme.title: Seven News At 4
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: The Chase Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Larry Emdur, The Chase is a general knowledge race where players must ensure they stay one step ahead of the Chaser, some of the finest quiz brains in Australia. The Chase is on...

programme.title: Seven News
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mali struggles to find applicants for his new position at the Surf Club. Kirby turns up to apologise, believing she's partially responsible for his predicament.

programme.title: SAS: AUS v ENG
programme.desc: There's a surprise twist for recruits during the marksman task. Later, they tackle claustrophobic tunnels before a beasting pushes more than one recruit to their limit.

programme.title: The Front Bar
programme.desc: Join Sam Pang, Mick Molloy and Andy Maher as they share a laugh about the world of AFL and catch up with stars of yesteryear and today.

programme.title: Unfiltered
programme.desc: Hamish McLachlan sits down with some of the AFL's most prominent personalities for in depth conversations revealing, challenges, triumphs, and vulnerabilities, beyond their sporting achievements.

programme.title: The Agenda Setters
programme.desc: Footy’s home of hard-hitting opinions, breaking news, and respected analysis. Seven’s team of trusted and respected footy voices tackle the biggest topics and take viewers behind the headlines.

programme.title: Why Trains Crash
programme.desc: On 2 June 2023 a devastating train crash in India killed nearly 300 people. What caused it, could it have been prevented, and is enough being done globally to ensure our railways are safe?

programme.title: Kochie's Business Builders
programme.desc: This week we meet Trevor, founder of WildKids Australia, a program reconnecting kids with nature through outdoor learning and play. From bug hunts to bush adventures, kids are loving it.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max puts his treatment on the backburner in order to be present for a big domino transplant procedure. Also, Bloom reflects on her life while treating a young patient and Iggy takes a step forward in a long-standing case.

programme.title: Beat The Chasers UK
programme.desc: Contestants try to beat five chasers in order to win cash and bragging rights.
